title: The Great Mental Models Volume 2
subtitle: Physics, Chemistry and Biology
author: Shane Parrish
excerpt: A practical guide to the most powerful concepts from physics, chemistry, and biology — translated into mental models for better decision-making. Volume 2 of the Farnam Street series shows how leverage, inertia, evolution, ecosystems, and a dozen more scientific principles can help you navigate complexity, avoid common thinking traps, and see the hidden structure beneath everyday problems.
